8 Send me also ‘cedar’ trees, . fir trees, and algum treés, out of Lebanon; for I know that thy servanta have skill to cut timber'in: Lebanon; and, behold, I will send my servents with thy servants, :
fir tree...cedar—if even the cedars (the highest in the state) are not spared, how much less the fir trees (the lowest)! (JFB Bible Commentary)

daughters of Dan, and his father was aman. of Tyre,. skilful. to work. in gold, and in silver, in. brass; in iron, in stone, and-in timber, in purple, in blue, and. in fine linen, and in crimson; also to grave any. manner of graving, and.to find out every device which shall be put to him, with thy cunning men, and with. the cunning men of my lord David thy father.
